title: thalictrum bauhini subsp. procerulum
intro: Thalictrum bauhini subsp. procerulum, also known as the Himalayan meadow rue, is a perennial plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and calm digestive issues. The plant's health benefits also extend to its potential in lowering blood pressure, improving respiratory function, and acting as an expectorant to aid in cough relief. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
